next_steps: Implementation scope is complete and constrained to this ticket's described boundaries.
last_comments: Defined cache parity red specs for grouped payloads, tag invalidation, TTL expiry, and raw byte/prefix operations across memory and redis adapters. Documented the current blocker: the shared Redis test harness is still missing, so the new contract tests remain skipped pending TKT-268.

Pinned the cache normalization contract directly in app/foundation/cache_contract_test.go: `memory` and `otter` now have an explicit alias spec, and positive TTLs now have table-driven round-up coverage alongside the existing memory/redis backend contract suite. Synced docs/roadmap/01-framework-plan.md to describe those executable normalization rules. Verified with `go test ./app/foundation -run "TestCacheClient_|TestCacheNormalizationContract" -count=1`, `docket validate TKT-200`, and `docket validate TKT-267`.
